hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "\.blueprint\.json"; then echo "WARNING: You are about to edit a Make.com blueprint file. These should be edited in Make.com UI and re-exported. Proceed only if explicitly asked." >&2; fi'
hooks.description: Warn when editing blueprint JSON files

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.json$"; then python -m json.tool < "$FILE" > /dev/null 2>&1 || echo "ERROR: Invalid JSON written to $FILE" >&2; fi'
hooks.description: Validate JSON syntax after writing .json files
